# NUX MG30 Effects Documentation Wiki

This project creates a comprehensive public documentation for NUX MG30 guitar effects processor.

## Project Type: Documentation Wiki
- **Language**: Markdown
- **Platform**: GitHub Wiki/Pages
- **Content**: Guitar effects documentation
- **Structure**: Organized by effect categories

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] ✅ Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] ✅ Clarify Project Requirements
	<!-- Guitar effects documentation wiki for GitHub Pages/Wiki -->

- [x] ✅ Scaffold the Project
	<!-- Created documentation structure with markdown files for effects categories -->

- [x] ✅ Customize the Project
	<!-- Created example effect documentation, style guide, and migration script -->

- [x] ✅ Install Required Extensions
	<!-- No extensions needed for markdown documentation project -->

- [x] ✅ Compile the Project
	<!-- Validated markdown structure - no compilation errors found -->

- [x] ✅ Create and Run Task
	<!-- No task needed - static documentation project -->

- [x] ✅ Launch the Project
	<!-- Documentation ready for GitHub - no local launch needed -->

- [x] ✅ Ensure Documentation is Complete
	<!-- README.md and copilot-instructions.md created and updated -->

## Project Focus
- NUX MG30 effects documentation
- Public GitHub repository/wiki
- Organized effect categories (WAH, CMP, EFX, AMP, etc.)
- Searchable and user-friendly structure
